content_body: To start I will say you have a lovely home here. Very beautiful in the Blue Ridge Mtns. The serenity and relaxing atmosphere is just breathtaking. This place gave us time as a new couple to learn so many new and valuable things about one another. Things we will be able to use in our lives. Details "specific" I feel that tells alot about our own unique personalities that we can take away with us. Even at our age God can teach us if we listen to make our time here on the Earth and our lives even better. Thanks so much for allowing us to share in this experience in your gorgeous moutain retreat.
title: Perfect Retreat For A New Couple
